_comment: Android Digital Asset Links (RFC 8615 + https://developers.google.com/digital-asset-links). Required for publishing a Trusted Web Activity (TWA) wrapping Hire Adda as an Android app on Google Play, and for Android App Links that bypass the disambiguation dialog. Replace placeholder package_name and sha256_cert_fingerprints with real values once the Android app is generated (e.g. via Bubblewrap). Multiple objects in the array are supported — add release + debug keys both during development.
